## Summary

- Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Build or CI

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm run lint`
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] Not run because:

## UI evidence

Add screenshots or recordings for meaningful UI changes.

## API contract

- [ ] No API contract changes
- [ ] Uses an existing ObservAI API contract
- [ ] Requires ObservAI API changes or clarification

Notes:

## Security checklist

- [ ] No provider tokens, LLM API keys, credentials or sensitive evidence were committed.
- [ ] No new browser-visible secret was added through `NEXT_PUBLIC_*`.
- [ ] Logs and screenshots are redacted.

## Follow-up

- List follow-up work, or write `None`.
